actually since population density is not a good metric at all for how dense a city is

i doubt there is a place denser than hongkong?

happy to tip someone could show it as itd be educational for me
tweets.quoted_tweet_text:
cat was always confused when seeing cities being cited as denser than hongkong on paper, eg. manila or mumbai, cus they lack vertical height

turns out uninhabited mountains in hongkong counts as city, the neighborhoods of hongkong absolutely mogs the entire world
